title: Vicarious Calibration
description: Post-launch calibration of sensors that make use of natural or artificial sites on the surface of the Earth.

definitions.definition: Post-launch calibration of sensors that make use of natural or artificial sites on the surface of the Earth
definitions.sources:
- CEOS/ISO:19159 [ [RD10](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#iso:std:iso:ts:19159:-1:ed-1:v1:en) ]
- RD10: ISO/TS 19159-1:2014(en), Geographic information - Calibration and validation of remote sensing imagery sensors and data — Part 1: Optical sensors
